title: MANCHAP 2 Pack Bamboo Wooden Serving Platter Tray, 40 x 29 x 5cm Rectangular Large Butler Trays with Handles for Eating, Breakfast, Tea, Coffee
features: 【SOLID MATERIAL】 These bamboo serving trays with handles are made from natural bamboo material and it is a great alternative to plastic. The bamboo tray is really well made. It’s not too weighty but sturdy. The surface is varnished to give it a nice, smooth finish.

【PORTABLE DESIGN】 Our bamboo serving tray is designed with cut-out handles, making it easy to hold and transport. The tray can lay flat and rest comfortably on your lap without wobbling and is easy to store anywhere in your home.

【LARGE SIZE】 The bamboo tea tray has a large dimension of 15.7 x 11.4 x 1.9 inches. It is spacious for a dinner plate and a salad bowl. It makes work much more efficient. You can take all the ingredients for your meal preparation out of the fridge at once.

【MULTIPURPOSE】 These rectangular bamboo trays are ideal for cakes, desserts, breakfast, dinner, or other foods. It can be widely used in restaurants, bedrooms, living rooms, offices, kitchens and other places.
description: ➤Made from natural bamboo and coated with varnish, the wooden tray is easy to wipe down. Tips: It is not recommended to clean it with water frequently. Please dry as soon as possible after washing. ➤The rectangular wooden tray with handles is easy to carry and is large enough to comfortably hold large dinner plates. ➤Great for serving breakfast, coffee, tea and any other food that can be accommodated. ➤When organizing your room, you can use a rectangular bamboo tray as an organizer on which you can put many things at once. SPECIFICATION: Material: bamboo Color: light brown Size: 15.7 x 11.4 x 1.9 inches Quantity: 2 x wooden tray with handles
